sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a Windows program executable started from a suspicious folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Read Contents From Stdin Via Cmd.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect the use of "<" to read and potentially execute a file via cmd.exe
A General detection for files being created in the Windows startup directory. This could be an indicator of persistence.
Detects the use of the redirection character ">" to redicrect information in commandline
